recommendations.title: Emmanuelle: Queen of Sados
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to keep her stepdaughter from harms way after she hires an assassin to kill her husband, but the hitman turns and blackmails her for the crime.

recommendations.title: Interview with a Hitman
recommendations.overview: An elite hitman returns to erase his past only to find that somebody has messed with his future.

recommendations.title: London Calling
recommendations.overview: After fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong, a down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the son of his new crime boss and show him how to become a man.

recommendations.title: Mr. Right
recommendations.overview: A girl falls for the "perfect" guy, who happens to have a very fatal flaw: he's a hitman on the run from the crime cartels who employ him.

recommendations.title: Demon City
recommendations.overview: Framed for his family's murder and left for dead, an ex-hitman will stop at nothing to exact revenge on the masked "demons" who have taken over his city.

recommendations.title: Red Rock West
recommendations.overview: When a promised job for Texan Michael fails to materialize in Wyoming, Mike is mistaken by Wayne to be the hitman he hired to kill his unfaithful wife, Suzanne. Mike takes full advantage of the situation, collects the money, and runs. During his geta

recommendations.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard
recommendations.overview: The world’s top bodyguard gets a new client, a hitman who must testify at the International Court of Justice. They must put their differences aside and work together to make it to the trial on time.

recommendations.title: Contract Killer
recommendations.overview: Financially troubled, a newbie hitman reluctantly takes the job of finding the plotted killer of a Japanese tycoon.

recommendations.title: John Wick
recommendations.overview: Ex-hitman John Wick comes out of retirement to track down the gangsters that took everything from him.

recommendations.title: Weekend at Bernie's
recommendations.overview: Two young insurance corporation employees try to pretend that their murdered employer is alive by puppeteering his dead body, leading a hitman to attempt to track him down to finish him off.
